Container.Name: personal-health-tracker
Container.Overview:
A self-hosted app for tracking blood work and lab results over time. Upload PDF or image lab reports, review OCR-extracted values, and visualize trends across tests. Supports multiple users with JWT authentication and an admin panel. 71 built-in biomarkers across CBC, Lipids, Metabolic, Hormones, Thyroid, Vitamins, Liver, Iron Studies, Inflammation, Minerals, Coagulation, and Cancer Markers panels.
FIRST RUN: visit http://[your-unraid-ip]:[Host Port]/setup to create your admin account. Make sure to set a strong SECRET_KEY before use.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port to access the web interface.

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Stores the SQLite database and uploaded lab report files.

Config.Name: Secret Key
Config.Description: Required. A random secret used to sign JWTs. Generate one with: python3 -c "import secrets; print(secrets.token_hex(32))"

Config.Name: Max Upload Size (MB)
Config.Description: Maximum file size for uploaded lab reports in megabytes.

Config.Name: OCR Backend
Config.Description: OCR engine to use. Only 'tesseract' is supported.

Config.Name: Data Directory (internal)
Config.Description: Internal path where data is stored. Do not change unless you know what you're doing.
